fallback: We don't have an explanation for this rule yet.

sil_top_heavy.headline: A lot of volume on top and bottom — the outfit loses its shape.
sil_top_heavy.fix: Try slimmer trousers to balance your {dominant_piece}.

sil_contrast_ideal.headline: Perfect contrast — a roomy top against a slim bottom creates a strong look.

sil_all_fitted.headline: Everything fits close — clean and tidy, but lacks some tension.
sil_all_fitted.fix: Try an oversized jacket or unstructured blazer to break the tight line.

sil_bottom_heavy.headline: Slim on top, wide below — a deliberate and confident choice.

color_warm_cool_clash.headline: Warm and cool tones are fighting each other.
color_warm_cool_clash.fix: Try a neutral piece between them — black, white or grey softens the conflict.

color_warm_cool_bridged.headline: Warm and cool tones meet, but the neutral piece ties it together.

color_monochrome.headline: Consistent colour feel — calm and considered.
color_monochrome.fix: Try a burgundy sweater or olive jacket to break the monochrome palette.

color_low_contrast.headline: Everything is in the same tonal range — can feel a bit flat.
color_low_contrast.fix: Try a white tee underneath or dark shoes to create depth contrast.

theory_statement_piece.headline: You have one bold piece owning the outfit — the rest supports without competing.

theory_competing_statements.headline: Two bold pieces are competing for attention.
theory_competing_statements.fix: Try a simple tee or shirt instead of one statement piece to let the other shine.

theory_three_piece_rule.headline: Three layers add depth and make the outfit more composed.

theory_minimal.headline: Clean and minimal — fewer pieces, stronger expression.

arch_tailored_mismatch.headline: Your profile is {archetype}, but {clashing_piece} pulls in a different direction.
arch_tailored_mismatch.fix: Try a knit instead of {clashing_piece} or loafers instead of sneakers to match your style.

arch_street_refined.headline: You're mixing street with tailored pieces — can work as a deliberate choice.

arch_perfect_match.headline: The outfit hits your style precisely — everything connects.

trend_oversized_accepted.headline: Oversized is a strong expression right now.

trend_wide_leg_current.headline: Wide trousers are an on-trend choice.

depth_all_dark.headline: Everything is dark — the outfit lacks depth and contrast.
depth_all_dark.fix: Try a white or light grey tee under your jacket to open up the look.

depth_all_light.headline: Very light — can look washed out without an anchor.
depth_all_light.fix: Try a dark belt or dark shoes to anchor the outfit.

depth_navy_black_clash.headline: Navy and black together looks unintentional — they're too similar to contrast.
depth_navy_black_clash.fix: Try swapping one for charcoal or pure black for cleaner lines.

season_coat_shorts.headline: A coat and shorts send mixed season signals.
season_coat_shorts.fix: Try full-length trousers with the coat, or swap the coat for a lighter layer.

season_heavy_top_light_bottom.headline: Heavy jacket over light shorts — the weight balance is off.
season_heavy_top_light_bottom.fix: Try a lighter jacket like a bomber or overshirt for better balance.

shoe_sneakers_tailored.headline: Sneakers under a blazer create a formality gap.
shoe_sneakers_tailored.fix: Try loafers or chelsea boots to match the blazer's level.

shoe_boots_shorts.headline: Boots and shorts — a deliberate statement combo.

shoe_loafers_hoodie.headline: Loafers and a hoodie is a high-low mix — can work as a deliberate choice.
shoe_loafers_hoodie.fix: Try a knit instead of the hoodie to match the loafers' elegance.

shoe_formal_with_street.headline: Formal shoes with a street profile — the shoes pull in a different direction.
shoe_formal_with_street.fix: Try sneakers or boots that match your street style.

acc_watch_polish.headline: The belt adds a polished smart casual touch.

acc_scarf_editorial.headline: The scarf adds a considered detail that elevates the look.

acc_bag_completes.headline: The bag completes the outfit — the extra touch that shows you've thought about the whole.
